subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who is one in His oneness and single in His singleness. Verily He hath caused the Word to appear from the horizon of heaven [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی توحد بالوحدانیه و تفرد بالفردانیه قد اظهر الکلمه من افق سماء
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prophecy and fulfillment, @predictions and prophecies, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @spiritual transformation, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings
